title: Active compound / constituent
description: A bioactive plant constituent as a first-class entity. One file per compound in compounds/<id>.yaml. Plant records link to these via constituents[].compound, enabling plant<->compound and compound<->action relationships.

class.description: Chemical / biosynthetic class, e.g. flavonoid, organosulfur, sesquiterpene-lactone, alkaloid.

actions.description: Action ids this compound is credited with (mechanism).
